response.justification: Senior/staff-level full-stack engineer with 14+ years of experience, including current role at re:cinq building AI-agent infrastructure and internal tooling. Demonstrates strong backend (Node.js, TypeScript) and frontend (React) capabilities with excellent testing and architecture focus. Primary concerns are Nest.js and Vitest not explicitly mentioned in experience, and a name/identity mismatch in the resume header requiring clarification.
strengths: Significantly exceeds seniority requirement with staff-level roles and 14+ years total experience, including current re:cinq position building internal tooling
Direct AI agent infrastructure and MCP framework expertise aligns perfectly with the uncommon required skill, while maintaining strong TypeScript, Node.js, and React foundation
Deep testing and software craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, Docker, Kubernetes, and AWS CDK experience demonstrates engineering rigor and systems thinking
concerns: Nest.js and Vitest not explicitly mentioned despite being primary stack requirements; relies on foundational Node.js and testing expertise to bridge this gap
Resume header shows 'AISHA OKONKWO' while all contact information, links, and work history point to Szabo Bogdan; identity mismatch requires clarification
No explicit demonstration of authentication, authorization, or security best practices in work history; assumed knowledge at this level but unvalidated

key_factors.factor: Nest.js and Vitest not explicitly demonstrated
